composition.boundary: One watch flow execution owns one current runtime resource and one fixed bounded loop.
composition.awaiting: The loop admits at most concurrency promises, applies backpressure with Promise.race, and joins all active promises before return.
composition.activation: Each received lease executes exactly one activation flow with per-exec delivery tags.
composition.scope_seam: Every physical queue or timer action is reached through a required tag-carried flow port.

cases: two sessions sharing one server scope

lifecycle_dependency.ordinary_graceful_shutdown: Stop admission and join all active promises before return and current-resource cleanup.
lifecycle_dependency.forced_context_close: Depends on later Lite implementation of the accepted DKR-2 discovery; it is not required queue behavior today.

decision: candidate only; not accepted by this writer
